name: Client Status
desc: Client sends a status update: respawn after death or open inventory (to achieve).
notes: PERFORM_RESPAWN is sent when the player clicks "Respawn" after death. REQUEST_STATS opens the statistics screen.

implementation.overview: C16PacketClientStatus sends a client status change: PERFORM_RESPAWN (0) when clicking respawn, or OPEN_INVENTORY_ACHIEVEMENT (1) to silently open the inventory. This packet is used by AutoRespawn (sends PERFORM_RESPAWN when dead), InventoryManager (sends OPEN_INVENTORY_ACHIEVEMENT to open inv for chest steal/armor equip), and Disabler modules (cancel C16 to prevent server from tracking inventory state).

modules.name: AutoRespawn
modules.purpose: Automatically click respawn when the player dies.
modules.how_it_works: When the player dies (detected via S06PacketUpdateHealth or S42PacketCombatEvent), the module immediately sends C16PacketClientStatus with PERFORM_RESPAWN.

modules.name: Inventory Manager (Open Inv silently)
modules.purpose: Open the player inventory for management modules without requiring the user to press E.
modules.how_it_works: Sends C16 with OPEN_INVENTORY_ACHIEVEMENT. The server processes this as if the player pressed E and opens the inventory GUI. Used by ChestStealer, AutoArmor, and other inventory management modules.

modules.name: Disabler (C16 cancel)
modules.purpose: Cancel C16 to prevent server from tracking when you open inventory.
modules.how_it_works: Some anti-cheats track when you open inventory (to detect auto-armor). Cancelling C16 prevents this.

implementation.general_hooks: EventSendPacket. PERFORM_RESPAWN (0) for respawn, OPEN_INVENTORY_ACHIEVEMENT (1) for inventory.
implementation.client_variations:
Tenacity 5.1: AutoRespawn sends PERFORM_RESPAWN. InvManager sends OPEN_INVENTORY.
Astro 2.2.1: InvManager sends OPEN_INVENTORY.
Gugustus: AutoArmor, InventoryCleaner, AutoSoup, NoSlow all send OPEN_INVENTORY.
Monsoon 3.0-A6: InvManager + AutoArmor both use C16.
Vestige 3.0: Disabler cancels C16 + C0E together.
